blockingIssues.description: The prior orphan-process scope blocker remains unresolved: client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_invariants.py still does not assert cleanup across full harness-owned mitmdump/tuistory/temp-home descendant scope.

Runtime no-click verification is still unsound: test_nav_keyboard.py parses only raw ESC SGR mouse bytes, while script -k logs escape sequences in caret notation, so emitted mouse events can be missed.

appliedUpdates.description: Added command `lint-tuistory: cd client && uv run --with ruff ruff check tests/tuistory` to cover tuistory test linting.
Documented transition-history handoff contract in .factory/library/tuistory-harness.md (CC_SENTIMENT_TRANSITION_HISTORY_PATH -> .transition-history.json -> state.json["transition_history"]).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update tui-tests-worker guidance to explicitly document script -k keyboard log encoding (`^[` escape notation) for event-log assertions, so runtime mouse-event checks do not rely on raw `\x1b` bytes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of fix-scenario-cadence-and-enter-budget-assertions found runtime-input.log parser mismatch between expected raw ESC bytes and script -k caret encoding.
